If the beneficiary was enrolled in more than one plan during the year, this is the plan benefit package 
identifier for the plan in which the beneficiary was enrolled at the end of the year. 

SHORT NAME: PLNPBPRC 

LONG NAME: PLAN_PBP_REC_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: 3-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: For 2006–2012, this variable was always encrypted to comply with CMS privacy rules. 

You need to know both the Part D contract
